Recommendations

Partners & recommendations

Our personal recommendations around your stay in Zadar – lovely places to stay, the sailing school for your boating licence and our own boat offering.

🏝️ Staying in Zadar

Holiday flats with pool

Villa Dalmatina Zadar

Well-kept, modern holiday flats with pool and garden in a quiet location – family-friendly, with warm hosts.

★★★★★ 4.9 · 61 reviews
Villa Dalmatina Zadar →
Holiday flat · central location

Apartment Lea Maria

Cosy, immaculately kept holiday flat in a perfect location – just steps from the old town, the Sea Organ and restaurants.

★★★★★ 5.0 · 3 reviews
Apartment Lea Maria →

⚓ Getting your boating licence

Boating licence course

MAG Sailing School Zadar

Boating licence courses in German in Zadar – get your licence and take to the sea in Croatia yourself.

MAG Sailing School Zadar →

🛣️ From us: out at sea

Our sister offering · Boat rental

Skipper & Boat Rent Zadar

Private boat tours & boat rental with a German skipper from Zadar – hidden bays, islands and sandy beaches on a comfortable daycruiser.

★★★★★ 5.0 · Google
Skipper & Boat Rent Zadar →
Out on the water too?

Private boat tours & boat rental with a German skipper from Zadar – our sister offering Skipper & Boat Rent.

Croatian Home CareSkipper & Boat Rent · Zadar

German-speaking property care & management around Zadar and the islands – personal, reliable, with our own boat.
